## Summary

- What changed:
- Why:
- User-visible impact:

## Validation

- [ ] `build.cmd` completes with zero warnings and zero errors.
- [ ] `test.cmd` completes successfully; if it was not run or Windows code integrity / Smart App Control blocked it, that is documented above and is not marked as passed.
- [ ] Relevant UI, power, GPU, DPI, or persistence behavior was checked.
- [ ] No generated EXE, local settings, credentials, logs, or personal paths are included.

## Security and scope

- [ ] I reviewed every changed line before requesting execution or merge.
- [ ] This change does not add networking, telemetry, remote control, automatic updates, bundled drivers, or new dependencies; otherwise the impact is explained above.
- [ ] Workflow, build script, P/Invoke, and release changes are explicitly identified.
- [ ] A successful build is not presented as proof that the code is safe.
